content.full_text:
April 28, 1992

Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Dear Sirs:

This is to confirm telephone advice from FPPC concerning the filing requirement for a newly elected Sausalito City Councilmember.

Former Sausalito Planning Commissioner Amy Belser has already filed an annual statement for calendar year 1991 as a Planning Commissioner. She was elected to the Sausalito City Council on April 14, 1992 and assumed office on April 21, 1992, with no break in service between Planning Commission and City Council.

It is our understanding that her annual statement for 1991, which is already on file with you, will suffice for the balance of 1992 and that no leaving office statement as a Planning Commissioner or assuming office statement as a Councilmember will be required.

Sincerely,

Janet F. Tracy
Assistant to the City Manager/
City Clerk

cc: Councilmember Amy Belser
John Truxaw, City Attorney
